title: ML agent dispatcher logs raw conversational content (user turn + LLM final answer) at INFO

completedScopes: Scope 1 — Redact agent.invoke.request / agent.invoke.envelope diagnostic logs
doneCertificationBlockers: G088 (commit-ordering, ONLY remaining): the security-to-doc content gates all pass at status=in_progress; the orchestrator owns the two-commit done-flip — commit this planning truth, then stamp certifiedAt/certifierAgent and set status=done in a follow-on commit. By design this guard cannot be cleared from inside the artifact edit itself.

RESOLVED G028: the pre-existing fail-loud `os.environ.get(KEY, "")` reads in ml/app/agent.py were the DEFAULT_FALLBACK false positives; cleared at commit 2fd51b44 (implementation-reality-scan now passes).

RESOLVED content gates (this certification pass): Check 6/6B 11-phase pipeline (security/implement/test/regression/validate/audit/docs genuine; simplify/stabilize/devops/chaos honest phaseStubs), Check 4 DoD, Check 5/G027 completedScopes, Check 8A via Scope-Kind contract-only opt-out, Check 11 report sections, G053/G093 Code Diff Evidence, G094 Single-* justifications, G097 HMAC disclosure, G040 deferral language.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Code-level review of the spec 076 assistant-completion surface surfaced one Medium finding: ml/app/agent.py emits two diagnostic INFO logs (agent.invoke.request first_user_msg, agent.invoke.envelope final_preview) carrying raw user turn text + raw LLM final answer (<=300 chars each) at production log level, violating spec 076 Hard Constraint 6 and the project's Go-side prompt_sha256 redaction discipline. Other axes (tool authz deny-by-default, provenance gate, citeback verifier, egress SSRF deny-by-default, telemetry HMAC privacy, SST fail-loud, role-separated prompts) verified CLEAN.

Redacted both diagnostic logs to length+type metadata (first_user_msg_len, final_len) preserving trace_id and shape diagnostics. Two log-format statements in ml/app/agent.py; no control-flow, envelope, or non-log behavior changed.

Adversarial regression ml/tests/test_agent_log_redaction.py plants canaries in the user turn AND the LLM final answer and asserts absence from all INFO records. Proven RED against the unfixed dispatcher (1 failed, 509 passed) then GREEN after the fix, same session. Evidence in report.md.

Re-ran the adversarial regression (ml/tests/test_agent_log_redaction.py: 1 passed, exit 0) and the full ml/tests suite (513 passed, 3 skipped, exit 0) via the ml/.venv pytest — no Docker, no live stack — confirming the redaction holds and no ML regression. Evidence in report.md Test Evidence.

Validated the fix is behavior-preserving against the committed diff (eadfada7): only two logger.info format strings + their argument expressions changed; the return envelope, control flow, and provider routing are unchanged. Spec scenarios A01/A02/A03 are each asserted by the regression. Evidence in report.md Validation.

OWASP A09 finding closed: no raw user-turn text or raw LLM final answer reaches INFO logs; diagnostic logs retain trace_id + shape metadata, mirroring the Go turn-log prompt_sha256 discipline. Change boundary respected (two log statements). No secret-bearing fields introduced. Evidence in report.md Audit.

The redaction, root cause, fix design, committed diff, and GREEN evidence are documented in report.md (Summary / Fix / Code Diff Evidence / Test Evidence) and design.md. No external operator-facing docs reference these internal diagnostic log fields.

simplify.reason: No-op: the fix is the minimal redaction (two logger.info format strings + their argument expressions). There is no added abstraction, duplication, or dead code to simplify — the change strictly removes raw content from two existing log lines.
simplify.justification: A two-log-statement metadata redaction has no structural complexity surface; simplify would have nothing to act on.

stabilize.reason: No-op: no flaky or intermittent behavior exists. The regression is deterministic (injected completion_fn, no live LLM, no network, no timing) and the full ml/tests suite is GREEN (513 passed). There is no instability to stabilize.
stabilize.justification: Deterministic unit-level log assertion; nothing non-deterministic was introduced.

devops.reason: No-op: zero deploy/CI/infra surface. The change touches only two log statements in ml/app/agent.py; no Dockerfile, compose, CI workflow, config, port, or deployment artifact changed.
devops.justification: Log-format-only change has no build/deploy/runtime-config footprint.

chaos.reason: No-op: no fault-injection or resilience surface. The redaction does not change control flow, error handling, provider routing, or the return envelope — it only reduces what two diagnostic logs emit. There is no failure mode to probe that the deterministic regression does not already cover.
chaos.justification: Behavior-preserving log redaction; chaos abuse has no new failure surface to exercise.

certificationCompletion.note: All security-to-doc content gates pass at status=in_progress. The orchestrator owns the G088 two-commit done-flip: commit this planning truth, then stamp certifiedAt + certifierAgent and set status=done in a follow-on commit. The code fix + adversarial regression are complete and GREEN (committed eadfada7).

executionHistory.summary: Security trigger (stochastic-quality-sweep R25) reviewed the 076 assistant-completion surface and surfaced + owned BUG-076-001 (raw conversational content in ML dispatcher INFO logs).

executionHistory.summary: Applied the redaction fix (two log statements in ml/app/agent.py) and proved the adversarial regression RED->GREEN in the same session. Committed at eadfada7.

executionHistory.expansionReason: completing the security-to-doc child mode via parent-expansion: the nested workflow runtime lacks runSubagent, so the orchestrator executed regression/validate/audit/docs inline rather than dispatching separate bubbles.regression/validate/audit/docs specialists
executionHistory.summary: Re-ran the adversarial regression + full ml/tests suite GREEN (513 passed, 3 skipped, exit 0) via ml/.venv pytest; validated behavior-preservation against the committed diff; audited the OWASP A09 closure; confirmed report.md/design.md docs. simplify/stabilize/devops/chaos recorded as honest phaseStubs (no runtime/perf/deploy surface).
